hotel_description: Hotel Sahiwa sits on Temple Road in Mcleodganj, about 200 m from His Holiness Temple. It has an on-site restaurant which serves Indian, Chinese and local dishes. Luggage can be stored at the 24-hour front desk.

address: 7,H.D.Lama Road, 734101 Darjeeling, India – Show map
hotel_description: Situated in the heart of Darjeeling, Hotel Marvel International is within a convenient 10-minute walk to the famous Mall Road and Big Bazar. It operates a 24-hour front desk and provides free Wi-Fi access throughout the property. Cooled with a fan, cosy rooms feature wall-to-wall carpeting, a seating area and a TV with cable channels. Each room comes with an attached bathroom offering hot and cold shower facilities. Hotel Marvel International has a tour desk that can assist guests with bookings of sightseeing excursions and travel arrangements. Laundry services and meeting/banqueting facilities are available on request. The hotel offers an in-house restaurant serving a menu of local, South Indian and Chinese dishes. Guests may also enjoy meals in private with room service. Hotel Marvel International is approximately 85 km from the New Jalpaiguri Railway Station, while Bagdogra Airport is within 90 km away. Airport transfer can be arranged at an additional charge.

address: Near Circuit House Road, 342006 Jodhpur, India – Great location -
hotel_description: One of our top picks in Jodhpur. Built in 1927, Ajit Bhawan Palace, a heritage hotel offers modern and stylish accommodation with free WiFi in a palace. Spread across 20,500 square metres, it features an outdoor pool and restaurant. The property provides free private parking and is located near the Circuit House in Jodhpur. The nearest market is Rai Ka Bagh, which is 3 km from Ajit Bhawan. Mehrangarh Fort is 4 km from the palace. Jodhpur Airport is 5 km. The air-conditioned rooms and suites are equipped with a flat-screen cable TV, electronic safe and minibar. Private bathroom includes a shower, hairdryer and free toiletries. A 24-hour reception welcomes guests at Ajit Bhawan, which has its own tour desk and business centre. Relaxing massage treatments are also available at an extra charge. Guests can enjoy a desert safari, or a drive in a vintage car or a village safari. The Jodhpur Café specialises in traditional Rajasthani delicacies and also serves international cuisine. Garden Restaurant is an open-air restaurant where multi-cuisine and barbeque is served while authentic Rajasthani delicacies can be enjoyed at Dhani Restaurant. Refreshing beverages can be enjoyed at the J Bar.

hotel_description: Situated in the lively Main Bazar, Cottage Good Day is conveniently within 1 km from New Delhi Bus Stand and Delhi Railway Station. Free Wi-Fi access is available in the entire property and parking is provided at no charge. Fitted with tiled flooring, air-conditioned rooms are simply furnished with a wardrobe, a flat-screen TV, an electric kettle and seating area. The private bathroom comes with bathrobes and shower facility. Operating a 24-hour front desk, Cottage Good Day can assist with luggage storage, currency exchange and laundry services. The in-house restaurant serves a selection of Indian, Continental and Chinese dishes. Room service option is available. Cottage Good Day is just 12 km to Indira Gandhi International Airport. The famous Red Fort, Connaught Place and Chandni Chowk are also 12 km away. Airport transfer and shuttle services can be arranged at additional charges. Paharganj is a great choice for travellers interested in city trips, sightseeing and monuments.

hotel_description: Set amidst lush greenery, Hotel Deep sits atop Mussoorie hill station offering unparalleled views of the Himalayan mountain range. It operates a 24-hour front desk and provides free parking on site. The hotel is conveniently a minute’s drive to Picture Palace Bus Stand. Dehradun city is within 35 km away, while Jolly Grant Airport is approximately 55 km from the hotel. Offering panoramic mountain views, spacious rooms are fitted with a fan, tiled flooring, a wardrobe and sofa seating area. Rooms feature a satellite TV, telephone and tea/coffee making facilities. The en suite bathroom comes with hot shower. Hotel Deep provides currency exchange, laundry and car rental services. Guests can exercise at the fitness centre, or enjoy a session of billiards and table tennis at the games room. The tour desk can assist with sightseeing excursions and travel arrangements. The hotel houses a multi-cuisine restaurant serving a delectable spread of vegetarian and non-vegetarian dishes. Room service option is also available.

hotel_description: Built in the 1920’s by Maharaja Bir Bikram, Royal Heritage Tripura Castle features an underground bomb shelter and tunnel, which leads out to Rose gardens. A 24-hour reception welcomes guests at the property, which has its own travel desk and provides free private parking. A selection of fine teas including herbal teas is available at The Tea Lounge. Rice Court serves Indian and Chinese cuisines while Café Heritage offers a mix of Mediterranean, Asian and North Eastern dishes.

Located next to the Governor's Residence, Park Hyatt Chennai sits alongside the Guindy Forest Reserve. Chennai Trade Centre is 7.2 km away while Chennai International Airport is 9 km from the hotel. Guests can look forward to holistic wellness therapies at Antahpura Spa. The Flying Elephant is a multi cuisine restaurant featuring open kitchens. The Dining Room is an all day dining restaurant serving Indian and Western cuisine. Guindy is a great choice for travellers interested in business, friendly people and culture.

Most rooms feature a living area. Club Mahindra Kangra Valley has a 24-hour front desk and a travel desk where tours and day trips can be arranged. The Dhauladhar Restaurant and Lounge serves Indian and International dishes while The Breeze offers alcoholic beverages. Room service is available.

Manuallaya is 1.5 km from Vashisht Hot Spring and 3 km from Hadimba Temple. It is approximately 52 km from Kullu Airport and the Rohtang Pass. Offering a balcony with garden or mountain views, heated rooms are equipped with a flat-screen satellite TV, seating area and electronic safe. Private bathroom includes a bathtub, hairdryer and free toiletries. Massage treatments, steam and sauna facilities are offered at the resort’s spa. A 24-hour reception is available. Khibber Restaurant specialises in Indian cuisine. Café Jardin, which is a 24-hour cofee shop, serves breakfasts and a light lunch. Chinese and Tibetan dishes are available at D'Jong restaurant. The Library Bar offers a selection of mocktails, cocktails and a classic collection of books.

Refreshing wines and spirits are offered at the bar. Room service is provided. address: Village Gahan, Summer Hill, 171005 Shimla, India – Show map
hotel_description: One of our bestsellers in Shimla! Offering peace and tranquillity, Shimla Havens Resort is situated at an altitude of 1,951 m above sea level. Spread across 6 acres of land and surrounded by pine and cedar forests, it offers contemporary rooms, a fitness centre and 3 food and beverage options. Rooms feature teak flooring and modern furnishings. Equipped with heating, they also come with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and an electronic safe. A spacious marble bathroom with bathtub and separate shower cubicle are a standard across all rooms. They offer views of the cedar forests, mountain ranges or the gardens. Guests can work-out at the fitness centre or make arrangements for activities ranging from rock climbing and white-water rafting to valley crossing and yoga. Shimla Havens also offers a 24-hour front desk and free parking. The Cedar restaurant offers views of the forest, while The Deck is an open-air restaurant. Both serve Indian, Chinese and Continental dishes. For an after-dinner drink, guests can head to Stimulus bar, which offers fine wines and spirits. 24-hour room service is available. It is 4 km to the Inter-State Bus Terminus and 1 km to Summer Hill Railway Station. Shimla Airport is 16 km away.

Whitefield is a great choice for travellers interested in warm weather, business and friendly people.

It provides simple accommodation with private bathrooms and free Wi-Fi access. The guesthouse has a tour desk and a restaurant on site. The rooms feature a colourful décor and come fitted with freshly laundered beddings. They are equipped with a writing desk, a comfortable seating area and a satellite TV. Some rooms have air conditioning. The guesthouse is located 24 km from Babatpur Airport Varanasi and 5 km from Varanasi Junction Railway Station and Varansai Bus Station. Kashi Vishwanatha Temple is a 10-minute walk away, while Assi Ghat is 1.5 km from the guesthouse. The guesthouse has a tour desk which helps guests organise excursions to popular attractions. It also provides luggage storage services at its 24-hour front desk as well as currency exchange facilities. The restaurant serves a selection of Indian dishes. It also has an international menu. Room service is provided for guests’ convenience.

hotel_description: One of our top picks in Bikaner. Spreading across 12 acres of land, Vesta Bikaner Palace features traditional Rajasthani architecture and offers large open courtyards, extensive lawns and an outdoor pool. Fitted with tiled flooring, air-conditioned rooms are equipped with a satellite TV, tea/coffee making facilities, a work desk and seating area. Vesta Bikaner Palace is just 10 km to Camel Research Farm and 11 km to Junagadh Fort. Gajner Palace and Bikaner Railway Station are 12 km away, while Bikaner Airport is accessible within 28 km.
